# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-07-04 by /mol:map._

## Inventory (monorepo)

npm workspaces `core`, `page`, `vsc-ext`; `python/` is a separate
hatchling-built PyPI package (not an npm workspace). Canonical source alias
across JS packages: **`@molvis/core`** (+ `/io`, `/io/formats`) → `../core/src/*`
(tsconfig `paths` + rsbuild/rslib alias), even though the published npm name is
`@molcrafts/molvis-core`. Shared runtime deps: `@molcrafts/molrs@^0.6.0` (WASM),
`@molcrafts/molplot@^0.1.0` + `vega`/`vega-lite`/`vega-embed` (charts).

### Module list

**`core/` — `@molcrafts/molvis-core` (engine library)**
- `commands/` — reversible `Command<T>` do()/undo(); `@command` registry (draw,
  frame, clear, selection, mark_atom, place_molecule, overlays, camera, snapshot,
  representation, attributes, composite, manager)
- `modifiers/` — pure `apply(frame,ctx)→Frame` (Select, Hide{Selection,Hydrogens},
  ColorByProperty, AssignColor, ComputeBonds, DeleteSelected, Slice, WrapPBC,
  VectorField, ExpressionSelection, TransparentSelection)
- `pipeline/` — single scene-data ingress; `DataSourceModifier` head +
  Draw{Atom,Bond,Box,Isosurface,Ribbon}, modifier_registry, bond_column_remap,
  auto_attach, nato_ids
- `mode/` — interaction modes, start()/finish() lifecycle (view, select, edit,
  manipulate, measure, menu_items)
- `transport/` — `rpc/` (router, serialization), `trajectory_worker/` (runtime,
  worker, protocol, frame_codec), ws_bridge, event_forwarder, state_sync
- `io/` — readers/writers over molrs; `formats.ts` registry (dependency-free),
  zarr, normalize_coords, `cache/` (OPFS blob + `.molidx`), `sources/`
  (blob-range/OPFS-sync)
- `system/` — trajectory, frame_diff, scene_synthesis, superposition, svd3,
  topology, elements
- `analysis/` — rdf, cluster(+properties), msd, rings, exploration,
  topology_analysis
- `artist/` — atom/bond buffers, palette, representation, style_manager, theme,
  material_factory, label_renderer, `isosurface/`, `presets/{classic,modern,vivid}`,
  `ribbon/`
- `camera/`, `overlays/`, `selection/` (expression + fence), `ui/` (core's
  **built-in canvas overlay**, distinct from page's React UI)
- top-level runtime: `app.ts`, `world.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `scene_index.ts`,
  `thin_instance.ts`, `artist.ts`, `picker.ts`, `highlighter.ts`, `grid.ts`,
  `settings.ts`, `config.ts`, `events.ts`
- support: `algo/marching_cubes.ts`, `export/gltf.ts`, `shaders/impostor.ts`,
  `types/` (wasm .d.ts), `utils/`

**`page/` — React 19 web app (single frontend for all hosts)**
- root: `index.tsx`, `App.tsx` (three-panel), `MolvisWrapper.tsx` (mounts core)
- `lib/` — `mount.tsx` + `mount-opts.ts` (mount public API), kekule-loader;
  `hooks/` — useMolvisUiState, useBackendConnection, useHostFileBridge, useTheme…
- `ui/layout/` — sidebars, dialogs (Settings/Export/Screenshot/StateSync),
  ClusterPanel, DataInspectorPanel, PCATool
- `ui/modes/` — per-mode panels: `edit/` (Builder, Kekule, Smiles, Tools),
  `manipulate/`, `measure/`, `select/`, `view/` (RenderTab, PipelineTab, one
  `modifiers/*` component per core modifier, DnD `pipeline/` tree)
- `components/ui/` — shadcn/Radix primitives

**`vsc-ext/` — `molvis` (VSCode extension host)**
- `extension/` — activate, configuration, types; `panels/` (editorProvider [text],
  binaryEditorProvider [dcd/trr/xtc], previewPanel, viewerPanel, panelRegistry,
  html, messaging, hotReload); `loading/` (molecularFileLoader, formatResolver,
  zarrDirectoryReaderCore)
- `webview/` — light core-canvas controller (`bootstrapWebview`, lazy core chunk);
  `viewer/` — full-page host (imports page's `@/App`)
- `test/` — unit (mocha) + integration (vscode-test)

**`python/` — `molcrafts-molvis` (PyPI driver)**
- `scene.py` — `Molvis` facade (session registry, WS lifecycle) composed of 7
  command mixins
- `commands/` — Drawing/Selection/Frame/Snapshot/Overlay/Palette/Pipeline mixins
  + `FrontendCommands` catalog
- `transport/` — `Transport` Protocol + `WebSocketTransport` + `_codec`;
  `control.py`, `events.py`, `runtime.py`, `palettes.py`, `errors.py`, `cli.py`

### Public surface
- **core `.`** — `mountMolvis()`, `MolvisApp`/`Molvis`, `MolvisRenderer`;
  config/settings/events; all modifiers + `ModifierPipeline`/`ModifierRegistry` +
  `DataSourceModifier`; commands; `ModeType`; `OverlayManager`; `SelectionManager`;
  camera (`CameraAnimator`, `TurntableTrack`); artist (`ColorMap`,
  `REPRESENTATIONS`, themes); analysis (`computeRdf`/`computeClusters`/…); WASM
  re-exports (`Frame`, `Block`, `Box`, `Trajectory`, `parseSMILES`, readers);
  transport (`RPCRouter`, `WebSocketBridge`); `exportFrameToGLB`
- **core `./io`** — `loadFileContent`/`loadFileStream`, `readFrames`,
  `FILE_FORMAT_REGISTRY`, `writeFrame`/`exportFrame`, `loadZarrFiles`,
  `BlobRangeSource`
- **core `./io/formats`** — `FileFormat` union, `FILE_FORMAT_REGISTRY`,
  `inferFormatFromFilename`, `isBinaryFormat` — deliberately dependency-free (no
  BabylonJS/WASM) for host activation bundles
- **page** — no package exports; de-facto `mountMolvisApp()`/`MountHostOpts`
  (`lib/mount.tsx`), `MountOpts`/`useMountOpts` (`lib/mount-opts.ts`), `App`
  default (consumed by vsc-ext via `@/App`)
- **vsc-ext** — `activate`/`deactivate`; `contributes` (customEditors
  `molvis.editor`/`molvis.binaryEditor`, commands
  `molvis.quickView`/`openEditor`/`reload`/`save`); `bootstrapWebview`
- **python `molvis`** — `Molvis`, `Transport`/`WebSocketTransport`,
  `EventBus`/`Selection`/`ViewerState`, `MolvisRPCError`, `detect_runtime`; console
  script `molvis`

### Style summary
- **core** — PascalCase, one concept per file, `Draw*Modifier`/`*Command`/`*Mode`
  suffixes; `@command("name")` decorator; `registerDefault*()` bootstrap modules
  (must stay in `sideEffects` allowlist); throw `Error` with concrete numbers;
  immutability enforced; `rslib`→`dist/` (publish only), `rstest` tests
- **page** — PascalCase `.tsx` + `use*` hooks; core via `mountMolvisApp`; charts
  via `@molcrafts/molplot` (the **only** molplot consumer); `rsbuild`→`dist/`
  copied into `python/src/molvis/dist/`; sidebar follows the Edit-tab dense
  contract (h-7 controls, text-[10px] headers)
- **vsc-ext** — camelCase, `*Provider`/`*Panel`; message-passing
  (`HostToWebviewMessage`/`WebviewToHostMessage`); two bundles (node extension +
  browser webview, the latter mirroring page's loader/alias); CSP
  `'wasm-unsafe-eval'`; publishes to Marketplace (vsce) + OpenVSX (ovsx)
- **python** — snake_case, `*Mixin` command groups, `Molvis` facade via multiple
  inheritance; session registry; `Transport` Protocol; `MolvisRPCError`; hatchling
  wheel bundling the page build

### Layer roles / dependency DAG
- **core** — engine library, **leaf** of the DAG. Depends only on
  `@molcrafts/molrs` (WASM) + BabylonJS + tslog. Must NOT depend on page, vsc-ext,
  or charting (verified: zero `molplot`/`vega` imports in `core/src`). Public
  surface strictly `.` + `./io` + `./io/formats`
- **page** — shared frontend; depends on core (alias `@molvis/core`) + molplot +
  Radix/Tailwind. Consumed by vsc-ext; shipped into the Python wheel
- **vsc-ext** — VSCode host; depends on core (webview canvas) **and** page
  (`@/App` full viewer). Charts reach it only transitively via page. Terminal node
- **python** — driver; ships the page bundle in-wheel, drives it over WS/JSON-RPC;
  depends on `molcrafts-molpy`. Terminal node
- **direction**: `core ← page ← vsc-ext`; `core ← vsc-ext` (webview); `python →
  (page bundle) over WS`. No cycles; charting confined to `page`; core
  charting-free per invariant

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
